sharedRecoveryProblem: Rows in this class may hide or remove visible cursor feedback. Recovery must not depend on seeing the cursor, clicking app UI, mouse position, pointer focus, workspace focus, Hyprland keybinds, or normal pointer behavior.
proofRequirements: UI/review projection with cursor visibility warning
no active runtime mutation during tests
visibilitySpecificRequirements: restore command must be shown before applying
warning must explain cursor may disappear or become hard to use
confirmation path must not require clicking keep with a visible cursor
timeout restore must be automatic if user cannot interact
result log must record whether confirmation or automatic restore occurred
futureLiveBoundaryRequirements: live execution remains disabled until a later explicit enablement sprint
persisted recovery plan and backup must exist before mutation
independent watchdog process must be armed before mutation
restore command and confirmation token must be presented before mutation
timeout restore must be automatic and file-reread verified
confirmation must be possible through a non-pointer path
UI review must use stronger cursor visibility warning than cursor.sync_gsettings_theme
